heading: AWS Cloud Development Kit
body:
If you prefer using familiar programming languages like JavaScript,
TypeScript, Python, Java, C#, and Go rather than using YAML or JSON (Javascript Object Notation),
you can use the AWS (Amazon Web Services) CDK (Cloud Development Kit) to deploy
Atlas resources. When you execute your AWS (Amazon Web Services) CDK (Cloud
Development Kit) applications, they automatically generate
CloudFormation templates, which in turn utilize the AWS (Amazon Web Services) CloudFormation
service for resource provisioning. This way, you benefit from the
abstraction and flexibility provided by AWS (Amazon Web Services) CDK (Cloud
Development Kit) and take advantage of the robustness of CloudFormation
for infrastructure management, while still using the programming
language of your choice.

> **See Also:** 
>
> - [Atlas AWS Cloud Development Kit](https://github.com/mongodb/awscdk-resources-mongodbatlas/blob/main/examples/README.md).
>
> - [How to Deploy Atlas with AWS CDK](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p7Fru0fbmxY) (Video Walkthrough).
